MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-20-2009 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF SAMANTHA SEINFELD'S MOTION FOR RE-SETTING TRIAL PREFERENCE DATE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 36 (E) GRANTED. THE TRIAL BY JURY IS SET FOR 11/23/09 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT ORDER THE FOLLOWING PURSUANT TO ALL PARTIES' STIPULATION: (1) THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE HELD ON 9/14/09 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 502. (2) DEFENDANTS GL PREMIER PROPERTIES AND GARY SAYED'S ANTI-SLAPP MOTION PREVIOUSLY FILED WILL BE HEARD ON 9/10/09 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. THE PARTIES ARE TO FILE COURTESY COPIES OF THE PREVIOUSLY FILED BRIEFS BY 8/21/09 IN DEPT. 301. ANY SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS TO BE FILED BY 9/1/09. (3) ALL DEFENDANTS ARE TO SET ANY MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR HEARING NO LATER THAN 11/13/09 WITH 20 DAYS NOTICE PERIOD. (4) DISCOVERY TO REMAIN OPEN UNTIL 11/9/09. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A.J. ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR# 8620 (206)
